title: pavonia bahamensis
intro: Pavonia bahamensis, also known as the Bahamian Rosemallow or Bahamian Mallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pavonia bahamensis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pavonia bahamensis can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including wounds and skin irritations.
